body:
monkiie:

and if i tell you about how rough my day went, would you hold me in your arms and kiss my head? hold my cheeks and whisper how i can rest now? before kissing my lips with soft kisses, knowing i heal from those sweet gestures. would you let me melt on you and return those kisses too?
